benefits.description: Elimination of food noise, ability to eat in a controlled manner without binge eating
Loss of 6 pounds in 1.5 weeks on top of previous 40+ pound loss with training and deficit
Significant reduction in chronic upper back and chest pain inflammation, almost numbing effect

side_effects.description: Intense nausea, even thinking about food caused nausea, could barely consume 1,500 calories
Intense bouts of anxiety and heavy chest sensation 24/7, not usually anxious but this brought out significant anxiety
Depression and emotional flatness, anhedonia, dopamine blunting effects, described as zombie mode

protocol_notes: Started at 2.5mg, reduced to 1.25mg after one week due to intolerable nausea and anxiety. User has ADHD diagnosis which may be contributing to dopamine blunting side effects. Considering discontinuation after 2 weeks due to anxiety and mood effects despite positive inflammation benefits. Previous 40+ pound weight loss achieved through strength training and calorie deficit before starting Tirzepatide.
